creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
Hi thank you for your answer.

MPRIS show a warning from the beginning, so I deactivate it.


I tried to remove old ~/.config/cmus too several time.


Same issue. 

In tried to rebuild the old version from port tree and get the same behaviour.

I guess something is broken with ncurses in my system. 

I have emacs too which use ncurses and this one seems to work (in windowed and non windowed mode).
